full_text:
Sun Huan (Shuwu) 孫桓 (叔武)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Huan (孫桓), styledShuwu (叔武). Part of invasion of Jing. Trapped at Yiling, he holds out until Lu Xun achieves victory. Sun Huan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Huan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
